 1namespace Tests_and_Interviews.Views
 2{
 3    using System;

 11
 12    /// <summary>
 13    /// TestPage is the main page where candidates take their tests.
 14    /// It handles loading the test, managing the timer, submitting answers, and showing the score and summary leaderboa
 15    /// </summary>
 16    public sealed partial class TestPage : Page
 17    {
 18        /// <summary>
 19        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="TestPage"/> class.
 20        /// The constructor initializes the TestPage and sets up the ViewModel. It also calls InitializeComponent to loa
 21        /// defined for this page.
 22        /// </summary>
 023        public TestPage()
 024        {
 025            this.InitializeComponent();
 026            var attemptRepository = new TestAttemptRepository();
 027            var answerRepository = new AnswerRepository();
 028            var testRepository = new TestRepository();
 029            var userRepository = new UserRepository();
 030            var questionRepository = new QuestionRepository();
 031            var gradingService = new GradingService();
 032            var timerService = new TimerService(attemptRepository);
 033            var validationService = new AttemptValidationService(attemptRepository);
 034            var testService = new TestService(testRepository, attemptRepository, answerRepository, gradingService, timer
 035            var dataProcessingService = new DataProcessingService(userRepository, attemptRepository, testRepository);
 036            var leaderboardService = new LeaderboardService(new TestAttemptRepository(), new LeaderboardRepository());
 037            this.LeaderboardViewModel = new LeaderboardViewModel(leaderboardService);
 038            this.ViewModel = new TestPageViewModel(userRepository, testRepository, questionRepository, attemptRepository
 039        }
 40
 41        /// <summary>
 42        /// Gets the ViewModel for the TestPage, which contains all the logic and data for managing the test-taking proc
 43        /// test details, tracking user answers, managing the timer, and submitting results.
 44        /// </summary>
 045        public TestPageViewModel ViewModel { get; }
 46
 47        /// <summary>

 51
 52        /// <summary>
 53        /// OnNavigatedTo is called when the page is navigated to.
 54        /// It checks if the navigation parameter contains the necessary information to load the test.
 55        /// </summary>
 56        /// <param name="eventArguments">The navigation event arguments, which should contain a TestNavigationArgs objec
 57        protected override async void OnNavigatedTo(NavigationEventArgs eventArguments)
 058        {
 059            base.OnNavigatedTo(eventArguments);
 60
 061            if (eventArguments.Parameter is TestNavigationArgs args)
 062            {
 063                this.ViewModel.OnTimerExpired = async () =>
 064                {
 065                    await this.ViewModel.SubmitAsync();
 066                    this.ShowScoreDialog(0f, expired: true);
 067                };
 68
 069                await this.ViewModel.LoadAsync(args.TestId, args.UserId);
 70
 071                if (this.ViewModel.AlreadyAttempted)
 072                {
 073                    var dialog = new ContentDialog
 074                    {
 075                        Title = "Test unavailable",
 076                        Content = "You have already attempted this test. Each test can only be taken once.",
 077                        CloseButtonText = "Back to Tests",
 078                        XamlRoot = this.XamlRoot,
 079                    };
 080                    await dialog.ShowAsync();
 081                    this.Frame.Navigate(typeof(MainTestPage));
 082                }
 083            }
 084        }
 85
 86        /// <summary>
 87        /// BackToTests_Click is the event handler for the "Back to Tests" button click event.
 88        /// </summary>
 89        /// <param name="sender">The source of the event, typically the button that was clicked.</param>
 90        /// <param name="eventArguments">The event arguments associated with the button click event.</param>
 91        private void BackToTests_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs eventArguments)
 092        {
 093            this.ViewModel.StopTimer();
 094            this.Frame.Navigate(typeof(MainTestPage));
 095        }
 96

 123        /// <summary>

 251        /// <summary>
 252        /// CreateSummaryEntryCard creates a UI card for displaying a single leaderboard entry in the summary dialog.
 253        /// It shows the user's rank, name, and score, and highlights the current user's entry if applicable.
 254        /// </summary>

 256        /// <param name="name">The name of the user associated with this leaderboard entry.</param>

 0305                TextWrapping = TextWrapping.Wrap,
 0306            };
 0307            Grid.SetColumn(nameText, 1);
 308
 0309            var scoreText = new TextBlock
 0310            {
 0311                Text = $"{score:F1}%",
 0312                FontSize = 15,
 0313                FontWeight = Microsoft.UI.Text.FontWeights.SemiBold,
 0314                HorizontalAlignment = HorizontalAlignment.Right,
 0315                VerticalAlignment = VerticalAlignment.Center,
 0316            };
 0317            Grid.SetColumn(scoreText, 2);
 318
 0319            grid.Children.Add(rankText);
 0320            grid.Children.Add(nameText);
 0321            grid.Children.Add(scoreText);
 322
 0323            border.Child = grid;
 0324            return border;
 0325        }
 326    }
 327}
